title: astragalus amherstianus
intro: Astragalus amherstianus, also known as Amherst's milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Astragalus amherstianus is valued for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to enhance physical endurance, reduce fatigue, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Astragalus amherstianus is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
